name: This infection turns people into......Demi Humans?
description:
"You'll be fine, but you might be a little furrier and a little of hornier, but trust and believe your still you."

A virus that turns you into a milf furry....yeah Im running out of ideas but its enjoyable slop for my furry lovers and milf lovers so go nuts.

Around the year 2040 a virus spreads, not the type that mind melts people, or the zombification. It turns people into furries, and not any type of furries milf furries. Yeah but society is still functioning just a lot of horny milf furries walking around
creator: LastUchihasBrother
